evidence_notes: Judged owned_repair_batch95 against Aqua Map visual witnesses, S-52 metadata, and semantic briefs.
Aqua Map images are reference-only; Helm canonical assets remain generated-owned SVG.
Pass means judge_pass_pending_final_approval only; no symbol is final human-approved.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals

verdicts.expected: LIGHTS05 is LIGHTS05. It is used as a light characteristic or lighted aid-to-navigation symbol. Required geometry: light symbol with the correct color cue and no invented hazard silhouette. Required colours: reference-defined. light symbol with the correct color cue and no invented hazard silhouette Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family. Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order. Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present. Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
verdicts.judge_comments: PASS-PENDING-HUMAN. LIGHTS05 now follows the Aqua Map visual witness for LIGHTS05: the recognizable pictogram family, label where present, and small-scale silhouette are preserved. Human final approval is still required.
verdicts.observed: LIGHTS05 now follows the Aqua Map visual witness for LIGHTS05: the recognizable pictogram family, label where present, and small-scale silhouette are preserved.
